productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Up Away White Tshirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 50% cotton and 50% polyester, has cap sleeves, graphic print on the front, and embroidered brand logo in white on the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print and embroidery Celebrate your winter vacation in style and fly away to the land of fun in this white T-shirt from flying machine. Created from soft cotton-polyester fabric, this piece of clothing will flatter your silhouette and offer exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans and canvas shoes for that absolute holiday look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7"", chest 33"" and waist 25"
